chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No. S- 06 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 10-02-2023 Mr. Umran Khan Yousufzai, Advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Ghulam Hassan Shah, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents, which is taken on record. Through instant Crl. Transfer Application, applicant Mst. Morzadi seeks transfer of Sessions Case No.484 of 218 (ref: The State- Versus Piral and others), arising out of Crime No. 159 of 2018 registered at P.S, Shah Latif under Sections 436, 506/2, 147, 148 & 149 PPC from the Court of Additional Sessions Judge-II, Khairpur to the Court of Additional Sessions Judge-IV, Khairpur on the ground that Sessions Case No. 542 of 2018, arising out of Crime No.161 of 2018 registered at said Police Station under Sections 365-B, 395, 147, 148 & 149 PPC is pending adjudication before the said Court between the same parties and it will be convenient for both the parties as well as Court to conduct the trial and pass judgments in accordance with law in both cases. Learned counsel for the private respondents as well as learned Additional P.G record their no objection for the grant of instant Crl. Transfer Application. Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application stands allowed by withdrawing the Sessions Case No.484 of 218 (ref: The State-Versus Piral and others), arising out of Crime No. 159 of 2018 registered at P.S, Shah Latif under Sections 436, 506/2,147, 148 & 149 PPC from the

Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application stands allowed by withdrawing the Sessions Case No.484 of 218 (ref: The State-Versus Piral and others), arising out of Crime No. 159 of 2018 registered at P.S, Shah Latif under Sections 436, 506/2,147, 148 & 149 PPC from the 2 Court of Additional Sessions Judge-II, Khairpur and same is transferred to the Court of Additional Sessions Judge-IV, Khairpur for decision in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
